main_hypothesis.justification: C1: 'propilenglicol residual' menciona PG pero no 'no-wetting'

key_signals.justification: C2: 4 signals breves (caudal 36%, cond 480, mejora, PG 20% 5m)

recommended_action.justification: C4: circulacion 20% 24h - direccional pero sin escalonado ni condiciones

decision_change_condition.justification: C6: generica 'si TOC alto cambio a fouling organico'
